meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to bypass the 'can't finish projects' trap and ship your MVP today.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' trap stems from architectural drift and scope creep. By deploying an Antigravity project template, you enforce strict modular boundaries and automated scaffolding. Combined with Claude Code, you transform high-level product requirements into production-ready code, forcing your MVP into a continuous, rapid deployment loop that guarantees shipping.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with a vision, but somewhere between the third database schema change and the endless CSS debugging, the momentum dies. It is not a lack of talent; it is a failure of systemization. You are fighting the friction of your own infrastructure.

Relief comes from removing the cognitive load of project architecture. The Antigravity template acts as an exoskeleton for your application, providing a pre-validated foundation that forces execution over perfection. When you pair this with the raw reasoning power of Claude Code, you stop writing boilerplate and start shipping value.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Skeleton
steps.description: Establish the project foundation by pulling the standardized Antigravity template, which enforces production-grade folder structures and essential middleware patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity production-ready template. Include authentication, Postgres integration, and Stripe billing modules.

steps.title: Define the Core Value Proposition
steps.description: Input your product requirements into the template to generate the necessary CRUD operations and API routes, preventing scope creep before it begins.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value prop: [INSERT YOUR IDEA]. Generate the database schema and API endpoints required to handle this specific user flow.

steps.title: Automate the UI Layer
steps.description: Use the template's component library to rapidly build the interface, ensuring mobile responsiveness and accessibility without manual coding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a landing page and dashboard view using the Antigravity component library. Prioritize conversion-focused layout patterns.

steps.title: Integrate Business Logic Hooks
steps.description: Inject your unique business logic into the pre-built service layer, maintaining clean separation between your code and the template structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer function that processes user input, applies our proprietary pricing logic, and updates the database records.

steps.title: Execute the First Deploy
steps.description: Validate your MVP by pushing the project to a staging environment, ensuring that the Antigravity template's CI/CD pipeline is fully functional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current build for deployment readiness. Run the automated test suite and suggest final production configurations.

pro_tips: Never modify the template's core middleware; treat the Antigravity structure as immutable to ensure future updates don't break your project.
Use Claude Code to write tests before features; the template includes a testing harness designed to fail if your code deviates from the core architecture.
Keep your product requirements in a single 'spec.md' file; updating this file is the only way to signal architectural changes to your AI agents.
Use the template's built-in telemetry hooks to track user engagement from day one, rather than trying to retroactively implement analytics.
If you find yourself stuck, ask Claude Code to 'summarize current technical debt' to see exactly which parts of your code deviate from best practices.
content.next_steps: Once the MVP is deployed, spend 48 hours getting your first 10 users. Do not add new features until you have validated the core loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start building for revenue. Our template ecosystem and AI tools are designed to slash your time-to-market by 70%. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
